---
title: "Welcome"
title-block-banner: true
lang: en
---

Lecturer in mathematics and statistics - Quebec, Canada
I am interested in applied statistics, reproducibility, and educational innovation.

:::{ .mt-4}
[🎓 Teaching](enseignement.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-danger .rounded-pill .btn-lg .fw-bold}
[📊 Research](recherche.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .btn-lg .fw-bold}
[💡 Educational innovation](innovation.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-warning .rounded-pill .btn-lg .fw-bold}
:::


## 2026 updates

::: { .grid .gap-4 }
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-lg-4 .news-panel}
### GPT-CDA in ULaval News
On May 22, 2026, ULaval News published a story about GPT-CDA, a conversational assistant designed to support learning in mathematics and statistics at the CDA.

::: {.link-list}
[Read the article](https://nouvelles.ulaval.ca/2026/05/22/le-gpt-cda-un-robot-conversationnel-qui-epaule-les-etudiantes-et-etudiants-dans-les-cours-de-mathematiques-et-de-statistique-66c35c61-4649-41a0-befb-c2f79036ac30){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}
[CDA page](cda/index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-lg-4 .news-panel}
### DonutMap and ggcircular on CRAN
The R packages `DonutMap` and `ggcircular` have been available on CRAN since June 2026. They support donut-chart mapping and visualization for circular data.

::: {.link-list}
[DonutMap](packages/donutmap.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}
[CRAN](https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/ggcircular/index.html){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}
[GitHub](https://github.com/AurelienNicosiaULaval/ggcircular){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}
[Documentation](https://aureliennicosiaulaval.github.io/ggcircular/){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-lg-4 .news-panel}
### SSC 2026
I led a workshop on AI and teaching, contributed to a public teaching-resource gallery, presented work on LOO-LBFP, and received the 2026 New Investigator Presentation Award.

::: {.link-list}
[AI Gallery](https://aureliennicosiaulaval.github.io/ssc-2026-ai-teaching-gallery/){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}
[LOO-LBFP presentation](https://github.com/AurelienNicosiaULaval/ssc-2026-loo-lbfp-presentation/raw/main/main-beamer.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-lg-4 .news-panel}
### Animal movement publications
A new article is published in *Methods in Ecology and Evolution*, and a bioRxiv preprint focuses on behavioural-state inference using Markovian step-selection functions.

::: {.link-list}
[MEE article](https://doi.org/10.1111/2041-210X.70313){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}
[bioRxiv preprint](https://doi.org/10.64898/2026.02.05.704063){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}
:::
:::
:::



## Featured

::: { .grid .gap-4 }
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### Doctoral thesis
Multi-state models for animal movement analysis.

[View PDF](https://corpus.ulaval.ca/server/api/core/bitstreams/cf3426a4-3475-4d48-a4c4-de29df846ed5/content){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}

[Code and materials](https://github.com/AurelienNicosiaULaval/multi-state-model-animal-movement){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### R packages
A set of R packages developed for applied statistics.

[DonutMap (CRAN)](https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/DonutMap/index.html){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}

[GLBFP](https://github.com/AurelienNicosiaULaval/GLBFP){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}

[CircularRegression](https://github.com/AurelienNicosiaULaval/CircularRegression){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}

[ggcircular (CRAN)](https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/ggcircular/index.html){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}

[GeneralOaxaca (CRAN)](https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/GeneralOaxaca/index.html){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}

[View all packages](packages.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### Open resources
A platform for open educational resources, tutorials, and teaching tools.

[site_ressources_SSD](https://aureliennicosiaulaval.github.io/site_ressources_SSD/){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}

[tutorizeR](https://github.com/AurelienNicosiaULaval/tutorizeR){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}

[ZeroWasteData](https://github.com/AurelienNicosiaULaval/ZeroWasteData){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}
:::
:::



## Quick links

- Teaching: course notes and assignments → [Teaching](enseignement.qmd)
- Research: projects, software, thesis → [Research](recherche.qmd)
- Educational innovation: projects and resources → [Educational innovation](innovation.qmd)
- About and contact → [About](a-propos.qmd)
- Full CV → [CV](cv/index.qmd)
